Weapon Module¶

Weapon entity module.

Provide a base class for weapon-type entities.

class model.entities.objects.weapons.weapon.Weapon(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Entity

Represent a generic weapon entity.

Provide cooldown-based usage logic shared by all weapons.

__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS: dict[str, type] = {}¶

Expected constructor parameters.

__ID_PREFIX: str = 'WPN'¶

Unique prefix for movable entities.

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_max_cooldown = 0.5¶

General max cooldown

apply_cooldown(dt)[source]¶

Update weapon cooldown.

Decrease cooldown by the given delta time and update readiness state when cooldown reaches zero.

Parameters:

dt (float) – Time delta to subtract from cooldown.

property cooldown¶

Return current cooldown value.

Returns:

Remaining cooldown time.

Return type:

float

update(dt)[source]¶

Update weapon state.

Apply cooldown logic and return whether the weapon is ready for use.

Parameters:

dt (float) – Time delta used for update step.

Returns:

True if weapon is ready, False otherwise.

Return type:

bool
